AE_EVENTS.REPORT_VALUE_3: IF YOU DISAGREE WITH THE DEFENDANT'S STATEMENT, WRITE TO THE COURT, STATING WHY YOU OBJECT, WITHIN SIXTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE POSTMARK. THE COURT WILL ARRANGE A HEARING.
